seo.title: Building RAG Pipeline with AG2 + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build rag pipeline with AG2 + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building a RAG Pipeline with AG2 enables multi-agent collaboration for document retrieval, context assembly, and LLM synthesis with source attribution. Guardrails are essential due to AG2's complex group chat dynamics, where agents can spiral off-topic, reach consensus on incorrect facts, or produce hallucinated outputs. Vex integration as a message hook provides real-time verification for source faithfulness and hallucination detection in high-risk scenarios.

architectureOverview.heading: RAG Pipeline Architecture with AG2
architectureOverview.description:
The RAG Pipeline in AG2 uses a multi-agent group chat: a Retriever Agent performs vector search on documents, a Context Assembler Agent aggregates relevant chunks with metadata, a Synthesizer Agent generates responses with citations, and a Verifier Agent checks outputs. Agents communicate via AG2's enhanced group chat, with speaker selection and termination conditions managing flow. Vex hooks into message events to verify retrieval relevance, context usage, and citation accuracy before final synthesis.

Key components include FAISS or Pinecone for vector search, sentence transformers for embeddings, and AG2's GroupChatManager for orchestration. The pipeline handles high document volumes by parallelizing retrieval across agents, but risks emerge from inter-agent miscommunication or biased speaker selection leading to irrelevant context injection.

risks.name: Agent conversation spiraling off-topic
risks.description: Retriever Agent fetches irrelevant documents due to query drift in group chat
risks.mitigation: Vex message hook enforces context relevance scoring before context assembly

risks.name: Group chat consensus on incorrect facts
risks.description: Agents agree on hallucinated facts from low-relevance retrieved chunks
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies source faithfulness across all agent messages

risks.name: Hallucination in synthesis
risks.description: Synthesizer Agent generates answers not grounded in provided context
risks.mitigation: Vex hallucination detection on final synthesis output

risks.name: Citation accuracy failures
risks.description: Incorrect or missing source attribution in final response
risks.mitigation: Vex citation verification ensures all claims map to valid sources

implementation.title: Setup AG2 RAG Agents
implementation.description: Initialize Retriever, Assembler, and Synthesizer agents with group chat manager
implementation.code:
from ag2 import AssistantAgent, GroupChat, GroupChatManager
from vex import VexClient

vex_client = VexClient(api_key="your-vex-key")

retriever = AssistantAgent(
    name="Retriever",
    llm_config={"model": "gpt-4"},
    hooks=[vex_client.message_hook]
)
assembler = AssistantAgent(name="Assembler", llm_config={"model": "gpt-4"})
synthesizer = AssistantAgent(name="Synthesizer", llm_config={"model": "gpt-4"})

groupchat = GroupChat(agents=[retriever, assembler, synthesizer], messages=[], max_round=10)
manager = GroupChatManager(groupchat=groupchat, llm_config={"model": "gpt-4"})

implementation.title: Vector Search Implementation
implementation.description: Retriever agent performs FAISS vector search on document embeddings
implementation.code:
import faiss
import numpy as np
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer

model = SentenceTransformer('all-MiniLM-L6-v2')
faiss_index = faiss.IndexFlatL2(384)  # dimension of MiniLM

documents = ["doc1 text", "doc2 text"]  # your docs
embeddings = model.encode(documents)
faiss_index.add(np.array(embeddings))

def retrieve_docs(query, k=5):
    query_emb = model.encode([query])
    scores, indices = faiss_index.search(query_emb, k)
    return [documents[i] for i in indices[0]]

implementation.title: Context Assembly with Metadata
implementation.description: Assembler combines retrieved chunks with source metadata for traceability

implementation.title: Synthesis with Citation Tracking
implementation.description: Synthesizer generates response with inline citations from context

vexIntegration.title: Register Vex Message Hook
vexIntegration.description: Attach Vex to all agents for real-time message verification
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import VexClient, GuardrailConfig

vex = VexClient(api_key="vex_123")
rag_config = GuardrailConfig(
    verifications=[
        "source_faithfulness",
        "hallucination_detection", 
        "context_relevance",
        "citation_accuracy"
    ],
    risk_profile="high"
)

# Register on all agents
for agent in [retriever, assembler, synthesizer]:
    agent.register_hook(vex.message_hook(rag_config))

vexIntegration.title: Context Relevance Verification
vexIntegration.description: Vex scores retrieved documents against query before assembly

vexIntegration.title: Source Faithfulness + Citation Check
vexIntegration.description: Final verification ensures response grounded in sources with accurate citations

cta.heading: Secure Your AG2 RAG Pipeline
cta.description: Install Vex today with `pip install ag2 vex-sdk` and register message hooks to protect your production RAG deployments.
